title: Intensely Salty French Fish Bowl
description: A dense and salty French dish featuring fish, salsa, and served in a stone bowl, perfect for kids and pescatarians alike.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the cod fish with salt, black pepper, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly.
Add the salsa to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and garlic mixture.
Place the cod fish in the skillet and spoon some of the salsa mixture over the top of the fish.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top of the fish.
Serve the fish in a stone bowl, spooning some of the salsa mixture over the top.
